name: viggomeesters.nl
description: Static personal landing page hosted on Vercel.

scripts.check: npm run check:projects && npm run check:certifications && npm run check:public-boundary && npm run check:feeds && npm run check:site
scripts.check:ci: npm test && npm run check && npm run check:seo
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run check:all && npx --yes vercel@55.0.0 deploy --prod
